overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a Ptolemaic city at dusk. The character moves along cobblestone streets lined with classical architecture, passing statues and colonnades before entering a grand temple-like building with towering columns.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient city main avenue with classical architecture

events.description: camera turns left revealing the full moon against the dark blue dusk sky, shifting the visible light sources

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the cobblestone street toward the city center, passing by a large stone statue on a pedestal

notable_agents.action: citizen walking along the right side of the street away from the camera

entered.detail: large stone pedestal with a statue on top, located on the right side of the street entrance
row of classical columns forming a covered walkway on the left side of the avenue
tall stone obelisk towering above the buildings in the distance
tall date palm tree visible against the sky
bright full moon visible in the dark blue evening sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a wide cobblestone avenue in an ancient city at dusk. A stone statue on a pedestal stands to the right, while classical colonnades line the left. In the distance, an obelisk rises against the darkening sky. Around 12 seconds, the camera turns slightly left to reveal a bright full moon, adding to the evening atmosphere as scattered pedestrians move about the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple precinct with monumental architecture and statues

agents.ego_description: walking along the right side of the street approaching the grand temple entrance, passing rows of statues

notable_agents.action: temple guard or citizen standing near the building entrance

entered.detail: massive stone building with tall columns and ornate facade dominating the right side of the street
series of classical marble statues on pedestals lining the temple approach
dark blue painted columns with ornate capitals supporting the temple facade
red fabric banners hanging between columns on the temple exterior

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking alongside a monumental temple building with towering blue columns and classical statues. Red banners hang between the columns, fluttering gently. The obelisk and palm trees from the previous segment now appear on the left side as the character moves forward. The architecture features Egyptian and Greek stylistic elements typical of Ptolemaic Alexandria.

scene_state.functional_zone: temple interior hypostyle hall with mosaic flooring

events.description: character walks through the massive temple doorway from outdoor street to interior hall

agents.ego_description: walking through the grand entrance portal into the columned interior, approaching an NPC near the back

notable_agents.action: robed figure standing in the interior doorway at the far end of the hall

entered.detail: massive doorway with blue painted columns framing the entrance to the interior
vast interior space with rows of columns supporting the roof
large stone columns with decorative capitals inside the temple
intricate geometric mosaic pattern covering the floor of the entrance hall
tall wooden shelves with scrolls or artifacts along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters the temple through a grand portal, transitioning from the cool dusk exterior to the torch-lit interior. Inside, a hypostyle hall with massive columns and intricate mosaic flooring extends ahead. Wooden shelving units line the left wall, and a robed NPC stands near the far doorway. The lighting shifts from natural dusk to warm artificial torchlight as the character moves deeper into the sacred space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling Ptolemaic city at dusk that culminates in the torch-lit interior of a grand temple. It begins on a wide cobblestone avenue lined with classical colonnades and stone statues, moving toward a distant obelisk as the camera pivots to reveal a bright full moon in the darkening sky. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward the exterior of a monumental temple featuring towering blue columns, fluttering red banners, and a blend of Egyptian and Greek architecture. The camera then follows the character through a grand portal, transitioning from the cool evening air into a hypostyle hall defined by massive columns and intricate mosaic flooring. Finally, the lighting shifts from natural dusk to warm artificial torchlight as the character moves deeper into the sacred space past wooden shelving and a robed figure.
